revision.text:
[[User:{{{1|example}}}|{{#ifeq:{{ucfirst:{{{1|example}}}}}|{{{1|example}}}|{{{1|example}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{1|example}}}}}}}]] ([[User talk:{{{1|example}}}|talk]]{{middot}}[[Special:Contributions/{{{1|example}}}|contribs]]{{middot}}[{{server}}/wiki/Special:Log/newusers?page=User:{{urlencode:{{{1|example}}}}} account creation]) {{documentation|content= == Example == ; Code *{{Useracc|TraBot}}
*{{Useracc|Ralbot}} ; Result *{{Useracc|TraBot}} *{{Useracc|Ralbot}} Note: This template will not show the correct account creation records for older accounts. {{Userspace linking templates}} [[Category:Username internal link templates|Useracc]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Username internal link templates

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
[[User:{{{1|example}}}|{{#ifeq:{{ucfirst:{{{1|example}}}}}|{{{1|example}}}|{{{1|example}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{1|example}}}}}}}]] ([[User talk:{{{1|example}}}|talk]]{{middot}}[[Special:Contributions/{{{1|example}}}|contribs]]{{middot}}[{{server}}/wiki/Special:Log/newusers?page=User:{{urlencode:{{{1|example}}}}} account creation]) {{documentation|content= == Example == ; Code *{{Useracc|TraBot}}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
